variants.name: a
variants.subject: quick question {{firstName}}
variants.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

Straight to the point: we help [ICP, e.g. agencies & consultants] [OUTCOME, e.g. book 5-10 qualified calls/month] without changing how they work — done-for-you.

[PROOF, e.g. +X calls in 30 days for a similar team].

Worth 15 min? [CALENDAR LINK or "just reply yes"]

[Your name]

variants.name: b
variants.subject: {{firstName}}, +10 calls/month?
variants.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

Would a steady stream of [OUTCOME] be useful for [your business] right now?

We handle everything — targeting, copy, sending, replies. You just take the calls.

Open to a quick chat this week? [CALENDAR LINK]

[Your name]

variants.name: a
variants.text: Hi {{firstName}}, bumping this in case it slipped. One line is enough if it's not the right time — otherwise I'll show you exactly how it works in 15 min. [Your name]

variants.name: a
variants.text: {{firstName}}, I won't keep pushing — closing this out on my side. If you ever want a predictable flow of calls without relying on referrals, my door's open. All the best. [Your name]
